instructions: Write your email using all the notes.

task.subject: A weekend bike ride
task.initialEmail: Hi,||I’m planning a bike ride on Sunday morning. [1]Would you like to come with me?[/1]||[2]Can we start at 7 a.m.?[/2] It gets busy on the roads later.||[3]Where should we cycle?[/3] I don’t want to go anywhere dangerous.||[4]Do you think we should take food with us?[/4]||Write back soon||Lucas

sampleAnswer.text: Hi Lucas,||Thanks for inviting me. [1]Yes, I’d like to come on the bike ride because I need some exercise and Sunday morning is free for me.[/1]||[2]Seven o’clock is too early, but we could start at eight instead and still avoid most of the traffic.[/2]||[3]I suggest cycling along the river path because there aren’t many cars and the views are nice.[/3]||[4]I agree that we should take some food with us. We could stop for a picnic halfway.[/4]||I’ll bring my helmet too.||See you then,||Dan
